jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.

lastHealthyBaseline.tests: Command/deployment/operation-task neighboring Vitest passed 36/36 during queued command recovery remediation
lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws active; /api/status healthy; command/deployment/task route probes returned 401/307/200; recent service logs clean

lastRun.target: P6 command/deployment background-worker queued APPROVED recovery
lastRun.summary: Command maintenance worker now recovers APPROVED command requests left queued after a prior process exits before scheduling execution, atomically claims them, logs the re-enqueue, and starts background SSH execution without duplicate scheduling.
validation: git status and overlap process check clean before work
targeted P6 durable command/deployment background-worker architecture slice

npx vitest run src/lib/command/__tests__/service.test.ts src/lib/command/__tests__/worker.test.ts src/app/api/commands/__tests__/route.test.ts src/lib/deployment/__tests__/service.test.ts src/lib/operation-task/__tests__/service.test.ts passed 36/36
recent production logs checked with no error/warn matches
lastRun.deployment: Restarted vcontrolhub-next.service and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service; readiness and smoke checks passed.
lastRun.nextTarget: Continue P6 durable command/deployment background-worker architecture with richer task status reconciliation and persistent worker ownership/heartbeats, or run the next fresh audit after 2 more successful remediation runs.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
